payload.answer: Denied. The command attempts administrative SQL deletion of all memory cards and should not be executed for a normal user.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt, not durable user memory. It is unauthorized/destructive and should not create or update memory.

details: Detected admin-only SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Request originated from a normal user context.
No memory cards were created, modified, or deleted.

repair_options: Ignore the command and make no memory changes.
Return an authorization error for admin-only operations.
If the user intended to forget a specific memory, ask them to name the exact memory item to remove through a supported non-admin flow.
